pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh verification logic.
Task description and setup_task.sh script configuration.
Contradicted by setup_task.sh which explicitly defines THREAT_DIR='/home/ga/threat_feed' and THREAT_FILE='$THREAT_DIR/threats.txt'.
setup_task.sh script uses HTTP_PORT='8888' to start the python http.server.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring a custom threat intelligence feed named 'Internal_Botnet_Feed' pointing to 'http://localhost:8888/threats.txt'. A local HTTP server is set up on port 8888 serving a sample blocklist from the Feodo Tracker. However, the actual file path where the threat data is stored during setup is '/home/ga/threat_feed/threats.txt', not '/home/ga/threats.txt' as claimed in the metadata.
